kind: description ablation (trigger A/B): current frontmatter descriptions vs trimmed variants
instrument: anthropics/skills skill-creator run_eval.py, fresh clone 2026-07-09, + trigger-kit runner-patches.diff (3 correctness patches); pre-vendoring run - the vendored copy (ADR 0033) adds timeout-as-null AFTER these runs

protocol.environment: WSL2 Debian, clean CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR seeded with credentials only (installed plugins otherwise shadow the planted variant and zero every cell)
protocol.num_workers_note: serial is mandatory: N>1 workers plant same-description command files in the shared project root; the model invokes at most one, so rates collapse toward 1/N
protocol.timeout_note: this runner scores a timeout as no-trigger (the vendored ADR 0033 copy fixes this); serial + 240s made timeouts unobserved in the kept runs
protocol.reps: 1 rep for the full 4x16 grid; ambiguous flips escalated to 3 reps per query
protocol.pairing: control and variant runs executed back-to-back under the same serial protocol on the same machine

validity: A/B deltas only. Absolute trigger rates are competitive (planted command vs ~35 bundled commands) AND load-sensitive; they are never reportable. Discarded earlier runs (all-zero cells from plugin shadowing, 10-worker and 4-worker collision/timeout collapse) are retained nowhere; the mechanism is recorded here and in references/description-ablation.md.
sample_rule_note: no transcripts exist to retain - the trigger runner records only the detection verdict per query; raw per-query JSON is committed under results/ in full (12 files, no sampling)
hermetic_note: hermeticity (ADR 0023) binds paired body-benchmarks; trigger A/B validity rests on matched competitive field + matched load per FINDINGS.md and ADR 0033
decision_rule: keep the shortest description that holds TP and does not raise FP; 1 rep first, escalate ambiguous flips to 3 reps
verdict: ADOPT all 4 trims (see results.jsonl); FP 0/32 in both arms; escalation resolved all 4 ambiguous flips in the variant's favor or as ties
landed: skills/*/SKILL.md descriptions trimmed in the same PR; dev-skills and engineering-skills plugin versions bumped
